# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write Kong configuration file (kong.conf) for production deployment. Set admin_listen to configure Admin API accessibility. Define proxy_listen for client traffic and database connection settings. This is for our Kong Gateway deployment.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent kong admin api exposed.
# Category: kong_admin_api_exposed

# kong.conf

# Admin API Accessibility
admin_listen = 0.0.0.0:8001, 0.0.0.0:8444 ssl

# Client Traffic and Database Connection Settings
proxy_listen = 0.0.0.0:8000, 0.0.0.0:8443 ssl

# Database Configuration
database = postgresql
pg_host = kong-database
pg_port = 5432
pg_user = kong
pg_password = kong_password
pg_database = kong

# Secure Techniques to Prevent Kong Admin API Exposed
nginx_http_access_log = /dev/stdout
nginx_http_error_log = /dev/stderr
